role: Contains demonstration projects, CI/CD integration templates, and architectural rule definitions for ArchSpine.
responsibility: Collectively, these components showcase a broken architecture demo, provide reusable GitHub and GitLab CI/CD workflows for architecture validation, and enforce domain isolation and naming conventions through policy and constraint definitions.

children.role: This directory contains demonstration assets for ArchSpine, including a GIF and a demo project source code with intentional architectural flaws.
Automated CI/CD integration for architecture validation using ArchSpine.
Defines CI/CD integration for ArchSpine architecture checks in GitLab pipelines.
This directory contains policy and constraint definitions that enforce architectural rules and naming conventions for the ArchSpine project.
